title: Orchestration Log Entry
description: Single immutable entry in the append-only orchestration log (orchestration.log.jsonl)

ts.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp when event was written

task.description: Task ID this event pertains to

from.description: Previous state. Null for newly created tasks.

duration_ms.description: Execution time in milliseconds. Present on done/fail events.

unblocked_by.description: Task ID that resolved the blocker. Present on unblock events.

escalation_reason.description: Why escalation fired. Present on escalation events.

retry_count.description: Retry attempt number. Present on retry events.

error.description: Error message. Present on fail/escalate events.
